Module 2: The Problem
Solution (P.S.) Path
!
Executive Summary
!
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 1 of 3 --

• 	The PS Path is how you create real value in your launches - it overlays
on top of the triggers and stories
• 	Critical formula used in the past: Problem - Agitate - Solve.
• 	Problem: stain in your clothes - it looks horrible
• 	Agitate: You spent a fortune and now it’s worth nothing
• 	Solution: Buy this magic lotion to fix the stain
• 	The P.S. Path works much better
• 	People love it because their prospects receive so much value
through the three PLC videos
• 	But it’s not just about creating value and sharing content - it must
lead into a sale
• 	Common Issues
• 	If you give away too much great content you’ll have nothing left to
sell
• 	If you hold onto content and not give any value before asking for the
sale, you won’t get the sale
The three pieces of PLC get tied together with the Story and P.S. Path.
First decide on a major Problem and Solution - this will be solved over the
course of the PLC videos.
!
2	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 2 of 3 --

Break down this bigger problem-solution into smaller problem-solutions. In
each PLC, define a problem and solve it. You’ll also define the next
problem in the previous video.
In the first and final PLC video you must define the biggest problem. Solve
this problem when you sell the product - in the Sales Video/Letter
• 	Example: PLC 1 for Product Launch Formula
• 	Initial problem: You must launch - the life of your business depends
on it
• 	Solution: Sideways Sales Letter - the defining element of PLF
Why? Because you you want to build momentum and trust. If you can
create a new P.S. for each video that’s ideal - or you can solve one grand
P.S. over the series of PLC’s.
The P.S. Path is how you deliver massive value that delivers into the sale
without giving away the farm.
!
!
